results.title: IBS-GEC ESTRO-ABS recommendations for CT based contouring in image guided adaptive brachytherapy for cervical cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 34019918. 2021/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To find out the simple relationship between Total Reference Air Kerma 
(TRAK) and various isodose volumes. Calculated isodose volumes were compared 
with experimental data for revised Manchester and International Commission on 
Radiation Units and measurements (ICRU)-89 Point A-based treatment plans. The 
accuracy of the formula was compared with the results of other relationships 
available in the literature.
MATERIALS AND METHODS: Dosimetric data
